user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new holiday calendar, so that I can define holidays for a location and year.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Holiday Calendar screen; When I click Add new holiday calendar and enter name, location, and year; Then the calendar is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the holiday calendar list with name, location(s), year, status, and applicability, so that I can review all configured calendars.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Holiday Calendar screen; When the list loads; Then I see each calendar's name, location, year, status, and applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the details of a holiday calendar, so that I can confirm the holidays it contains.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Holiday Calendar screen; When I click View on a calendar row; Then its holiday details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing holiday calendar, so that I can update holidays or its published status.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Holiday Calendar screen; When I click Edit on a calendar row and change its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the holiday calendar list, so that I can navigate all 66 calendars and see current data.
acceptance_criteria: Given the holiday calendar list spans multiple pages; When I click next/last or refresh; Then the list navigates and reloads accordingly
